title: Daily P&L metrics and Beat-Clockwork delta
acceptance_criteria: Exports a TypeScript interface: DailyMetrics = { totalTrades: number; winningTrades: number; totalPnlPct: number; winRate: number; closedTradeIds: string[] }
Exports `computeDailyMetrics(pool: Pool, personalityId: string, tradeDateISO: string): Promise<DailyMetrics>`

Query for closed trades: SELECT id, pnl_pct, pnl_abs FROM paper_trades WHERE personality_id=$1 AND status='closed' AND pnl_abs IS NOT NULL AND entry_time >= $2 AND entry_time < $3 — parameterized, no string interpolation
Sargable time filter: $2 = tradeDateISO + 'T00:00:00.000Z' (start of day UTC), $3 = next day start (add 86400000ms to $2 timestamp and convert to ISO)

All pg NUMERIC columns (pnl_pct, pnl_abs) arrive as strings from the pg client; uses Number(row.pnl_pct) and guards Number.isFinite() before any arithmetic — rows that fail the guard are logged and excluded from aggregates
totalPnlPct is the sum of all finite pnl_pct values
winRate = winningTrades / totalTrades — computed only when totalTrades > 0
Returns { totalTrades: 0, winningTrades: 0, totalPnlPct: 0, winRate: 0, closedTradeIds: [] } when zero closed trades — no division by zero ever occurs
Exports `computeBeatClockworkDelta(pool: Pool, personalityTotalPnlPct: number, tradeDateISO: string, marketRegime: string): Promise<number | null>`

Clockwork query: SELECT COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(pnl_pct::float8), 0) as total FROM paper_trades pt JOIN personality_configs pc ON pt.personality_id = pc.id WHERE pc.is_frozen = TRUE AND pt.status = 'closed' AND pt.pnl_abs IS NOT NULL AND pt.market_regime = $1 AND pt.entry_time >= $2 AND pt.entry_time < $3 — fully parameterized
Returns NULL (not 0) when the Clockwork COUNT = 0 for that date+regime combination — a delta of zero would be misleading when there were no Clockwork trades
Returns NULL when personalityTotalPnlPct is not finite (Number.isFinite check at function entry)
When Clockwork has trades, returns personalityTotalPnlPct minus the Clockwork sum — positive means the personality beat Clockwork
No default exports — named exports only
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
